It breaks sanity-lnet.sh test 206.

Patch Set 3:

> It breaks sanity-lnet.sh test 206.

I got a failure in 209 - only once though.
A nid that should have been 'ANY' wasn't detected as such.  This was a bug in lnet_nid_to_nid4() in the first patch.  I've updated.  I guess we start rebasing...  Maybe tomorrow.

Patch Set 3:

Thanks Neil.

commit.subject: LU-10391 lnet: change lp_disc_*_nid to struct lnet_nid
commit.message:
LU-10391 lnet: change lp_disc_*_nid to struct lnet_nid

Change lp_disc_src_nid and lp_disc_dst_nid in struct lnet_peer to
struct lnet_nid.

Test-Parameters: serverversion=2.12 serverdistro=el7.9 testlist=runtests
Test-Parameters: clientversion=2.12 testlist=runtests
